positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a crescent moon nestled in a cluster of stars and celestial flora. The style should be modern celestial abstract art, combining the clean line work of Art Nouveau with the bold negative space of Scandinavian design. Compositionally, the moon should be the central, dominant element, surrounded by delicate, swirling nebula clouds and stylized, geometric vines. Use a deep indigo and midnight blue palette contrasted sharply with pops of metallic gold and creamy white. The image must be perfectly symmetrical and suitable for screen printing on dark fabric, emphasizing high contrast silhouettes and crisp detail. Clean vector-like edges, high luminosity.
negative: blur, noisy, grainy, watermark, text, logo, signature, abstract shapes, poor anatomy, artifacts, low detail, dirty, smudges, low resolution, jpeg artifacts
